title: Mechanical equation GUI Add-on for Colossal Chests mod
description: This is an add-on for Mechanical Equation GUI pack,It made unique textures for most of the GUI images of Colossal Chests mod.
body:
## Mechanical equation GUI Add-on for Colossal Chests mod
This is an add-on for Mechanical Equation GUI pack,It made unique textures for most of the GUI images of Colossal Chests mod.If you want the same style for the vanilla GUI, download [Mechanical Equation GUI pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mechanical-equation-gui-pack).

**_Support for the Cyclops Core mod has been added to this pack, so there's no need to worry anymore._**

### **_Just keep in mind:_**

**_Make sure to credit, and don't claim Mechanical Equation GUI as your own creation._**
